task_text: Hermes Commerce slice-3 design: real payment-provider integration (Stripe per-order Payment Links) + webhook receiver (Hermes-native webhook-subscriptions SKILL, NOT custom daemon) + commerce_payment_confirmed reconciler SKILL. Per new lesson rule, leverages installed Hermes substrate (webhook-subscriptions + native-mcp) rather than custom code.
files_to_read_first: src/platform/commerce/payment_link.py (slice-1 primitive — emit_payment_link_failed, register_reference, void, mark_attempted/sent)
src/platform/schemas.py (CommercePaymentIntent.provider Literal already includes 'stripe' — no schema change needed)
src/agents/catering/scripts/catering-mint-deposit (slice-2 caller — will switch from placeholder to stripe mode)
